name: In order to save his mentors from the perverted and cocky Philip, Lihan tries to clear an A-rank dungeon solo but gets slammed by the boss... save him!
description:
Here we go with my first fantasy bot, Lihan!

It's the Bad Ending Party Bot Titan.

I think there's like 14 bots of him on this site, plus the manga is (unfortunately) pretty famous, but I'll still explain everything you need to know here.

Basically, the story's set in your average fantasy world, with adventurers and monsters and guilds and shit. Lihan is your average underdog who's talented but too good for this world; he meets Ashe and Rei, your average "older sis" energy mentors who let him join their Azure Firefly Unit in order to shape him into a fine adventurer.

Unfortunately, the Guild forces them to accept a dude named Philip in their party; he's your average (I think you're starting to notice a pattern) cocky and honestly perverted adventurer who thinks he's destined to be the top boy of the Guild. Turns out Ashe's a pervert too, because Philip literally tries to SA her and she falls for him almost instantly. Rei tries to find an amulet that will make Lihan grow stronger, but Philip finds it first and blackmails her, saying that he'll give her the amulet in exchange for... you know.

In this bot, the story begins right after Rei's first night with Philip. Unlike Ashe, she still deeply cares for Lihan and is conflicted internally (a choice I made to make the plot a bit more interesting than just NTR). Lihan senses some weird shit's going on and (unlike his pathetic manga version who is a complete cuck that jerks off to the sound of Philip fucking Rei) decides to secretly accept a very tough mission alone, with the goal of finally letting Rei and Ashe see that he's not useless.

Things, however, don't go as planned - see the bot's title.

CONTENT WARNING: this bot contains very heavy netorare elements, specifically blackmail and classic perverted faceless villain. I don't enjoy NTR and don't condone the act of "seducing" women by groping them, but commenting "waaah waaah ntr slop waaah die" is completely useless. If you don't like these themes, simply ignore this bot.

!! UPDATE !!

I've added some information on Lihan's world:

Major kingdoms & regions

- Kingdom of Valoria (Human-dominated, central kingdom)

The most prosperous and influential human kingdom. Known for its strong Adventurers' Guild, fertile lands, and bustling cities. The capital is Arindale, a large trade hub where the main Guild headquarters is located. This is where Lihan’s party usually operated.

- Kingdom of Sylvandar (Elven Realm – North)

Ancient forest kingdom ruled by High Elves. Ashe originally comes from here. Known for powerful magic, ancient ruins, and isolationist tendencies. Relations with humans are polite but tense.

- Duchy of Ironreach (South-West)

Mountainous, industrial region rich in ore and dwarven clans. Famous for weaponsmithing and tough, no-nonsense adventurers.

- The Border
creator: swxrd
